mapper.insert: insert into reviews (project_id, route_id, from_account_id, to_account_id, review_type, overall_score, content) values (#{projectId}, #{routeId}, #{fromAccountId}, #{toAccountId}, #{reviewType}, #{overallScore}, #{content})
mapper.update: update reviews set project_id = #{projectId}, route_id = #{routeId}, from_account_id = #{fromAccountId}, to_account_id = #{toAccountId}, review_type = #{reviewType}, overall_score = #{overallScore}, content = #{content} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, project_id, route_id, from_account_id, to_account_id, review_type, overall_score, content, created_at from reviews
